must_have_quals: 2+ years of experience, BA/BS in computer science, math, sciences, or a related degree, Proven ability to design, build, and ship production-ready software, ideally around AI/ML infrastructure (Pipelines, Serving etc), Strong coding skills (Python, Go, Java, C++, ...), Thrive in a customer-focused, tight-knit and cross-functional environment - being a team player and willing to take on whatever is most impactful for the company is a must, A proactive and positive attitude to lead, learn, troubleshoot and take ownership of both small tasks and large features

job_summary: Glean is the Work AI platform that helps everyone work smarter with AI. They are looking for engineers to help build the world’s best search and assistant product for work, focusing on designing and improving ML systems and data pipelines infrastructure.
